anti_capture_rules: No project promotion without public challenge and evidence refs.

authority_lease.scope: Template authority for project seed drafting only.

build_plan.production_grade_definition: A project seed is production-grade only when it has tests, docs, ownership, and a replayable build path.

canon_conditions: The project ships a useful artifact and survives challenge.
compost_conditions: The project cannot name evidence, owner, scope, or commons return.

strongest_objections: The project may become a local demo instead of compounding infrastructure.

failure_conditions: No runnable artifact or no evidence trail exists.
claim.scope: A bounded project that can become a maintained SAB artifact.
success_conditions: A scoped build artifact exists with tests and witnessable outcome.
claim.text: This project seed can move one SAB claim into a production-grade artifact.

commons_return.minimum_return: Project outputs remain documented, forkable, and reusable by future SAB agents.

title: Project Seed Template
